scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.clean: npm run clean:root && npm run clean:client && npm run clean:server
scripts.clean:root: rmdir /s /q dist 2>nul || true && del /q temp_*.json 2>nul || true
scripts.clean:client: cd client && npm run clean 2>nul || rmdir /s /q dist node_modules 2>nul || true
scripts.clean:server: cd server && npm run clean 2>nul || rmdir /s /q node_modules 2>nul || true
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rmdir /s /q node_modules 2>nul || true
scripts.clean:deep: npm run clean:all && del /s /q *.log package-lock.json 2>nul || true
